code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          let c = match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(v)
            v
          when None
            -1
          end
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      let value = num * sign
      if value > 0
        total = total + value
      else if value < 0
        total = total - value
      end
    end
  end
  println("r=#{total}")
end
